title: tribulus terrestris var. parvispinus
intro: Tribulus terrestris var. parvispinus, also known as small-spined puncture vine or small-spined caltrop, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tribulus terrestris var. parvispinus are numerous, including improving cardiovascular health, enhancing athletic performance, and supporting reproductive health. Herbal preparations of Tribulus terrestris var. parvispinus are commonly available in supplement form, including capsules and tablets, as well as teas and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being.
